title: PawlikowyMTD
description: Modpack for my own Minecraft Server. It has optimalization mods and some other ones as well. Feel free to use it.
body:
**This mod pack was created by me for my Minecraft server**. It aims to provide the best possible optimization and interesting gameplay_. You will find mods from optimization improvements to **Cave Dweller**, Water Creatures, Flags, **Terralith** - amazing and custom world generator, AI improvements, HUD enhancement, Custom loading screen, Furniture or even rifles and swords. It also adds many features such as in-game voice chat via proximity voice chat, player animations and many other elements allowing, for example: to play military RP. 

**This package was created for use on a specific server** but if you would like to upload it to your own, **you may encounter problems because it is a client side version**. 

If you would like to play with us on my server, please visit my [Discord](https://discord.gg/DJ75N62XRS), where you can find me, server IP address, and get to know the players! 

_I hope it meets your needs_.
